[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001101 4
1 10110001 4
2 00110001 3
3 11011100 5
4 01000111 4
5 00011011 4
6 11010100 4
7 00110100 3
